CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100002297) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ USA, LLC JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SUSAN SODERSTROM'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES IS GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL ACHIEVED AN GOOD RESULT FOR HER: MORE MONEY THAN SHE PAID FOR HER CAR, AFTER YEARS OF USING IT. DEFENDANT CHALLENGES NO SPECIFIC TIME ENTRY BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. COUNSEL'S RATES ARE REASONABLE FOR THE SAN FRANCISCO LEGAL MARKET. DEFENDANT CHALLENGES NONE OF PLAINTIFF'S COSTS OR EXPENSES. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-20-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Continued To Dec-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Sep-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF SUSAN SODERSTROM'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES is GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. Plaintiff's counsel achieved an good result for her: more money than she paid for her car, after years of using it. Defendant challenges no specific time entry by plaintiff's counsel. Counsel's rates are reasonable for the San Francisco legal market. Defendant challenges none of plaintiff's costs or expenses. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
